text: Science has a clearer story about amyloid plaques nuance than social media does. Amyloid plaques are linked to Alzheimer's, but their role is more complex than just being villains. They might even be a response to the disease, not the cause. Research shows some people with high plaque levels don’t develop Alzheimer’s. Confusing, right? It suggests a multifaceted relationship; amyloid plaques might be just one piece of the puzzle. For more insights into brain science, hit that follow button!
